title: The CIRCLES Framework for Product Design
summary: The go-to PM interview framework for design questions. A 7-step method to structure any product design problem from clarification to recommendation.

title: The North Star Metric
summary: The single metric that captures the core value your product delivers. Learn how to find yours, avoid the pitfalls, and build a metric tree beneath it.

title: RICE: Prioritising Features Without the Drama
summary: Reach × Impact × Confidence ÷ Effort. A repeatable scoring system that kills gut-feel prioritisation debates and surfaces what to build next.

title: Google's HEART Framework for UX Metrics
summary: Happiness, Engagement, Adoption, Retention, Task Success. Google's structured approach to measuring user experience beyond vanity metrics.

title: Jobs To Be Done (JTBD)
summary: People don't buy products — they hire them to do a job. Learn how JTBD reframes user research and unlocks the real competition your product faces.

title: The Kano Model: What Users Want vs. What Delights Them
summary: Not all features are equal. The Kano Model classifies features into Basics, Performance, and Delighters — and explains why delighters decay into basics over time.

title: Root Cause Analysis for PMs
summary: When metrics drop, don't treat symptoms. Learn the 5 Whys, metric decomposition, and a complete RCA checklist for diagnosing any product problem.

title: OKRs for Product Managers
summary: Objectives and Key Results done right. The difference between outputs and outcomes, how to write ambitious Key Results, and the most common OKR mistakes.

title: The Ultimate Product Teardown Framework
summary: A structured approach to deconstructing any product to understand its core loop, UX, and monetization strategy.

title: Writing an Amazon PR/FAQ
summary: Learn how to work backwards from the customer using the famous Amazon Press Release / FAQ format.
